content.problemStatement:
Write a program to take two numbers as input and print their difference if the first number is greater than the second number otherwiseotherwiseotherwise print their sum.


Input Format
First line will contain two numbers, (N1)( N1 )(N1) and (N2),( N2 ),(N2), separated by a space.



Output Format
Output a single line containing the difference of 2 numbers (N1−N2)(N1 - N2)(N1−N2) if the first number is greater than the second number otherwise output their sum (N1+N2)(N1 + N2)(N1+N2).
content.inputFormat: The first line contains two numbers, N1 and N2, separated by a space.
content.outputFormat: Output a single line containing the difference of two numbers (N1 - N2) if the first number is greater than the second number, otherwise output their sum (N1 + N2).

sampleTestCases.explanation: Since 82 is greater than 28, the program outputs their difference, which is 54.
Since 10 is not greater than 20, the program outputs their sum, which is 30.
Since 0 is not greater than 0, the program outputs their sum, which is 0.

solution.approach: Read two numbers from the input, compare them, and then either subtract the second from the first or add them together based on the comparison result.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) — the algorithm performs a constant number of operations regardless of the input size.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) — the algorithm uses a constant amount of space to store the input numbers and the result.
